content: بِدون شَكّ الصَحراَء الْبَيضاَء أحلى كِتير في الشِتاَء
translations: eng:the white desert is undoubtedly much prettier in winter

transcriptions.arabizi: bidoon shakk ilsahra' ilbayda' 'ahla kiteer fiilshita'
